display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1 测试版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: introduces Maintenance Rabbit v1. Every rendered RabbitMirror title receives a four-state on-demand patrol control: white idle, green healthy, yellow safely repairable using existing rescue routes, and red unknown with direct full-chain diagnostics. It never patrols or modifies content automatically. Retains 101 thematic elements, 177 presentation formats, Menu QR v2.1, source recovery, SVG data-URI body preservation, interaction rescue, thinking isolation, readability safeguards, and all existing features.
